episodes.title: It's a No From Me, Dawg
episodes.description: This week, I have some thoughts about the NXIVM cult. What started as a self-help and leadership program somehow turned into a secret society, branding ceremonies, and a lot of red flags. I’m talking about how ordinary, intelligent people can get pulled into groups like this, and why it's not always as obvious as you'd think. Plus, I'm sharing my Top 5 true crime and real-life drama podcasts, including some absolute favorites that will completely consume your life. (Links to them are below) I’m also answering some listener questions about: Managing anxiety The mystery of Malaysian Flight 370 Which kitchen utensil I would be (important stuff) And for this week's Jill Pill, a reminder to be careful what you normalize…because the things we accept over time have a way of shaping our lives. Grab your coffee, watch out for bears, and let's get into it. Host: Jill Pickering Follow me at: instagram.com/jipimusic instagram.com/takeajillpillpodcast tiktok.com/jipimusic takeajillpill.com Links: Read The Goodpasture Chronicles Escaping NXIVUM podcast This is Actually Happening podcast To Live and Die in LA podcast S-Town podcast Something Was Wrong podcast Betrayal podcast

episodes.title: Don't Let Me Join a Cult
episodes.description: This week we’re talking about cults…a topic I’ve been intrigued by for a long time. I’ve had a few run-ins with them over the years and I’ve had to ask myself, “Am I an easy target?” I’ve wondered if I’m giving off “approachable for recruitment” energy. Just kidding, mostly. In all seriousness, I used to live in Brentwood, Tennessee and regularly drove past what I later found out was the Remnant Fellowship, aka the Gwen Shamblin/Way Down situation. At the time, I just thought it was a really beautiful church. Would’ve been a great place for a wedding. Turns out, there’s a lot more to it. So today we’re talking about “The Way Down: God, Greed, and the Cult of Gwen Shamblin” and getting into how a weight loss program turned into something much bigger, the stories and rumors I’ve heard just from living nearby, and how people may get involved in situations like these. Plus: some reality TV thoughts, hibachi mishaps, my Top 5 qualities in a person, listener questions, and this week’s Jill Pill: trusting your gut. Host: Jill Pickering Follow me at: instagram.com/jipimusic instagram.com/takeajillpillpodcast tiktok.com/jipimusic takeajillpill.com
